name: discharge-gatekeeper-mcp-server-ts
description: TypeScript MCP server for Discharge Gatekeeper discharge-readiness workflows

scripts.pretypecheck: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const missing=['typescript','tsx','@modelcontextprotocol/sdk'].filter((pkg)=>!fs.existsSync('node_modules/'+pkg)); if(missing.length){console.error('Missing dependencies: '+missing.join(', ')+'. Run: npm ci'); process.exit(1);}"
scripts.smoke:release-gate: npm run smoke:runtime && npm run smoke:readiness && npm run smoke:evidence-layer && npm run smoke:readiness:regression && npm run smoke:demo-path
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run smoke:release-gate

author: Discharge Gatekeeper Team
